calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Joe Vickstein. Steven Miyake, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Martin G. Senior. Also present Lana, Property Manager for the Plaintiff. Defendant William Grgurich appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties per the record. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: WILLIAM GRGURICH, JR., IN PROPRIA PERSONA, DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY, 351 TURK STREET, #1013, SF, CA (415) 292-4686
STEVEN S. MIYAKE, ESQ. OF THE SHEPPARD ROSEN LAW FIRM, (415) 296-0900 FOR PLAINTIFFS AND OPPOSING PARTY.

RULING: DEFENDANT WILLIAM GRGURICH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT-Overruled with 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (REQ/301/SL) REPORTER: BELDON YEE, #2647
